NAME: hg19
KEYWORDS: GRCh37; UCSC; reference genome; FASTA; legacy assembly
DESCRIPTION: UCSC Genome Browser distribution of the GRCh37-era human reference (hg19): chromosomes chr1-22, chrX, chrY, chrM, plus unlocalized and unplaced contigs, alternate loci (e.g. chr6_apd_hap1), and related patches as packaged for the browser. Widely used in legacy pipelines and liftOver chains to/from hg38.
CITATION: UCSC Genome Browser. Human reference assembly hg19 (GRCh37-aligned). https://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/hg19/
